name: Spicy Szechwan Sauteed Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Hot bean paste or chili sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat wok with oil over high heat and stir in chicken pieces.
2. Cook for 2-2 1/2 minutes until browned.
3. Add the remaining ingredients except blanched broccoli florets and cornstarch, and stir for a further 1-2 minutes.
4. Mix well to combine all flavors.
5. Thicken the sauce by stirring in cornstarch.
6. Place chicken in the center of a dish with broccoli on each side.
